diagnoses.name: Thoracic facet syndrome / mechanical thoracic pain
diagnoses.source: Magee Orthopedic Physical Assessment; APTA spine CPGs

conditionLayers.observation: Localised paraspinal guarding, no neuro signs
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Rotation & combined extension-rotation reproduce local pain

diagnoses.name: Costovertebral / costotransverse joint dysfunction (rib dysfunction)
diagnoses.source: Magee; Cyriax selective tissue tension principles applied to the rib cage

conditionLayers.observation: Rib-angle tenderness, altered breathing on one side
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Deep breath & Evjenth-Gloeck breath-hold flexion localise rib source

diagnoses.name: Costochondritis / Tietze syndrome
diagnoses.source: Magee; differential diagnosis of anterior chest wall pain literature

conditionLayers.observation: Anterior chest tenderness ± swelling at costochondral junction
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Anterior chest-wall loading (springing, arm horizontal adduction)

diagnoses.name: Rib stress fracture
diagnoses.source: Magee; sports medicine rib stress injury literature (rowing/throwing athletes)

conditionLayers.observation: Focal rib point tenderness, splinting on breath
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Single-rib compression / spring reproduces sharp focal pain

diagnoses.name: Thoracic disc herniation / radiculopathy
keyExams: Neurological screen (lower limb myotome/reflex if radicular concern)

conditionLayers.observation: Band-like sensory change, possible cord signs
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Trunk movement provokes dermatomal band; screen cord signs

diagnoses.name: Scheuermann's disease / postural kyphosis
keyExams: Wall angel / foam roller thoracic extension test

conditionLayers.posture: Fixed increased kyphosis not correcting on extension
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Prone extension does NOT reverse the kyphosis (vs postural)

diagnoses.name: Osteoporotic vertebral compression fracture
diagnoses.source: Magee; spinal fracture red-flag screening literature

conditionLayers.observation: Acute focal kyphotic angulation, height loss
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Loading/percussion of the level reproduces sharp pain

diagnoses.name: Intercostal neuralgia
diagnoses.source: Magee; peripheral neuropathic pain differential diagnosis
keyExams: Sensory screen along affected intercostal distribution

conditionLayers.observation: Dermatomal band tenderness following a rib
conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Trunk rotation/side-flex along the intercostal reproduces band pain

diagnoses.name: Postural thoracic pain syndrome (sustained-posture pattern)
keyExams: Thoracic rotation and extension kinetic-chain screen

conditionLayers.functionalScreen: Symptoms build with sustained sitting, ease with postural correction
